body:
Mark is hands down the most progressive Attorney General our Commonwealth has ever seen. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30194580/288771738/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE2YzY3Ny02ZGM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LOPN0J6fhhqaexORykJ8fyMCUCO2_qp6ru2Tp2H8d4A=&emci=0787ea67-bbc3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=91a6c677-6dc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9499186) | Hi, it’s Speaker Eileen Filler-Corn! name: Rep. Torrey Harris
subject: Bill Lee's sister doesn't agree with him, and neither do I.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Peter
Two days ago, the entire world kicked off Pride month celebrating the progress and beauty of LGBTQ+ love. But as a lawmaker and a member of the LGBTQ+ community, I need to be honest, Pride month in Tennessee doesn’t bring very much joy. It reminds us of the hate brought onto us at the hands of Bill Lee. Lee’s own sister married her same sex partner in 2017, and as a wedding gift, Governor Lee passed some of the most homophobic and LGBTQ+ oppressive legislation in the country. These attacks on our LGBTQ+ community include banning adoption to Gay/Lesbian couples, prohibiting LGBTQ+ materials in public education, and harmful attacks on transgender youth. Whereas this slate of hate has a deep direct impact on the LGBTQ+ community, it also negatively affects the state as a whole.
If Bill Lee would harm his own sister’s livelihood in this way, imagine what he would do to people not related to him. In April 2021, it was reported that widespread economic and social impacts on Tennessee could be felt - due to the amount of anti-LGBT bills and laws within Tennessee. This Pride month, I hope you’ll honor and celebrate with me by standing up to Bill Lee. We must stop this attack on love.
$5, $10, $100, every cent counts and goes toward stopping Bill Lee and every single lawmaker hurting our state. Will you join us by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]
Ending this hate,
-Representative Torrey Harris

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: Growing up Black in the South
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica.
Making the hard ask for financial support for our campaign is never _not_ uncomfortable.
**So I wanted to tell you more about who I am,[_before I respectfully ask you to make a donation to our scrappy, unapologetic, AWESOME campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2170?refcode=em20210603-136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)**
**I’m Erica Smith.** I’m an engineer, educator, minister, and three-term state senator. Growing up Black in the South was difficult. But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith.
I was raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that my mother was raised on. My five siblings and I grew up picking cucumbers and corn on the family farm. Now it’s 2021, and **my mother still lives on the same dirt road, waiting for it to be paved.**
In fact, here I am standing on that dirt road just the other day.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2170?refcode=em20210603-136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)
All across North Carolina and America, good people are waiting on their roads to be paved. We are waiting for affordable health care, waiting for a living wage, and waiting for a representative who understands what it means to struggle, and who will fight for transformative change.
We can be that change, y'all. I’m running for U.S. Senate to create opportunities for communities like mine. **Together we can win a living wage, a Green New Deal, guaranteed single-payer health care, and so much more.**
If elected, I will fight like hell for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state in the Senate.
[**_If you’re with me, will you please make your very first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our historic, progressive campaign for U.S. Senate._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2170?refcode=em20210603-136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2170?refcode=em20210603-136&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210603-136-footer&t=23&refcode2=136_3698_zAdqVu&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=136%2E3698%2EzAdqVu)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: because of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
I know I’ve been asking a lot of you since becoming Chair of the TNDP – and apparently it’s been working. We are consistently meeting our fundraising benchmarks, and that’s because of you. That’s why I wanted to reach out and personally thank you. The TNDP feels a deep sense of gratitude for all our supporters, because without them we simply wouldn’t be able to do what we do.
From registration and mobilization, to updating infrastructure and digital efforts – your help has been paramount to our success. So once again, on behalf of all of us at the TNDP, thank you for your support!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

| | |

Friends, I would like to extend a large THANK YOU for all of the support you have shown by rolling up your sleeves and helping members of the community! In addition to supporting Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization's Home-Bound Senior Food & Water Drop that delivered food, water, and resources to the doorsteps of seniors, you also showed tremendous support for Be The Solution's launch event - An Evening of Women's Empowerment! THANK YOU to the hundreds of guests, volunteers, speakers, sponsors, and vendors who made An Evening of Women's Empowerment: The 2021 Women's Renaissance an overwhelming success!
Please check out this short video of some of the highlights from An Evening of Women's of Empowerment:

100 YEARS SINCE THE 1921 TULSA RACE MASSACRE
---
---
Photo cred: The National Museum of African American History & Culture.
---
100 years ago, The TULSA RACE MASSACRE of 1921 destroyed the lives, businesses & community of countless members of the Black community in Tulsa. In light of the 100 year mark, the media spotlight has illuminated survivors like 107 year-old, Ms. Viola Fletcher. She traveled to Washington DC and reminded Congress that while the country may forget what happened 100 years ago, she cannot.
The photo above is part of the 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre exhibit at the National Museum of African American History & Culture in DC. If you look closely, you will see that I am holding the hand of an older woman. I still remember how tightly she held on to my hand about 15 years ago. She was an original survivor of the 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre that occurred 100 years ago, and it was my privilege to assist her while we were in DC pursuing justice for the survivors. I had the privilege of being one of Professor Charles Ogletree's law school students at the time when he led efforts to seek justice for the remaining survivors who had been waiting for justice their entire lives.
Let us use this 100 year mark to do more than just share the stories of the survivors. We must tell their stories AND join the survivors in their quest for justice.

---
|
---
CHECK OUT THE MOST RECENT EPISODE OF THE EDWARDS EMPOWERMENT TALKS PODCAST!
In response to the need to inspire and empower people during these challenging times, I launched my podcast, The Edwards Empowerment Talks! Through this platform, I invite inspiring guests to tell their personal stories of perseverance and defying the odds to encourage my listeners and viewers to stay focused and dig deep in order to do the same in their own lives. I also invite guests whose community work will equip listeners and viewers with the tools to impact change in their own community, as well. * Denise Hamilton, Founder & CEO, WatchHerWork

---

In Episode 14 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has a motivational conversation with Denise Hamilton, author, speaker, and Founder & CEO of WatchHerWork. Denise grew up of modest means in New York. During her childhood, Denise watched her hard-working, resilient mother pursue the American dream by working a variety of jobs and projects. Through her own academic journey, Denise learned that talent is equally distributed, but it is opportunity that is not. Denise has worked in many spheres - modeling, as a marketing executive, in commercial real estate and even as a magazine executive before she became a public speaker and founded WatchHerWork. Her varied career path was the result of her openness to new opportunities and her willingness to say yes when those opportunities emerged. In this interview, Denise will inspire the audience to dare to explore the possibilities and to seek out ways to make them come to fruition. Denise is energetic, honest, motivating and encouraging, which makes this episode one that you do not want to miss!

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: An email about my role as chair of the Senate Intelligence Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30207777/288819434/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTY2OTFkNi04NmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1q6oT92w9XowUHhKMdQDjA_Ik7zx-EiYDWGsE62n3s=&emci=d1eafd4b-75c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ee6691d6-86c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

When Democrats reclaimed the majority in the U.S. Senate, I became the chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee. The Intelligence Committee oversees the entire U.S. Intelligence Community: from the CIA to the Defense Intelligence Agency to the intelligence elements of our Armed Forces. Many of the brave men and women who serve in our intelligence community live and work right here in Virginia.

**This is not a job I take lightly, especially given the events of the recent Colonial Pipeline hack. Many of our critical pipelines and electrical grids are vulnerable to cyberattacks, and I know there’s broad bipartisan support for safeguarding our national infrastructure. I pledge to work as quickly and efficiently as I can to protect Americans from cyberattacks.**

There’s also the matter of cleaning up the mess left by the previous administration. The Trump White House spent their entire time in office undermining and politicizing the Intelligence Community, which threatens lasting damage to America’s national security. Furthermore, in recent years we’ve seen an alarming rise in anti-government extremism and increasing cyber espionage conducted against the United States by hostile foreign actors.

In light of these grave threats, I have several top priorities for the Intel Committee:
1. **_Strengthen America’s cybersecurity capabilities_** so we never have a repeat of cyber attacks like the Colonial Pipeline hack or the 2020 SolarWinds cyber-espionage campaign.

2. **_Root out_** anti-government extremism, including the white nationalist militias who participated in the January 6th insurrection at our Capitol.

3. **_Rebuild_** intelligence community agencies and departments that were understaffed and under-resourced in the previous administration.

4. **_Depoliticize_** our intelligence-gathering apparatus, so these tireless and patriotic public servants can stay above the partisan fray and focus on their jobs: defending the American homeland.

I am honored to serve as Senate Intelligence chairman. **So, here is my promise to you, to all Virginians, and to our career intelligence professionals on the front lines: I will not let you down.** To the best of my ability, I will work to tackle extremism and cyberattacks, rebuild and depoliticize our Intelligence Community, and maintain the committee’s reputation for bipartisan work so we can protect America’s national security.

**[You can read more about my plans as Senate Intelligence Committee chairman in this recent article from _The New York Times_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30207778/288819435/1589303527?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTY2OTFkNi04NmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1q6oT92w9XowUHhKMdQDjA_Ik7zx-EiYDWGsE62n3s=&emci=d1eafd4b-75c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ee6691d6-86c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)**

Thank you,
Sen. Mark Warner _P.S. You’ve been added to Mark Warner’s email list because you’ve expressed interest in electing Democrats across Virginia. Your support will be crucial to protecting progress in our Commonwealth, but if you’d prefer not to receive Mark’s emails, you can[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d1eafd4b-75c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/ee6691d6-86c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTY2OTFkNi04NmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1q6oT92w9XowUHhKMdQDjA_Ik7zx-EiYDWGsE62n3s=&id=106350877) here._

name: Team Franchot Digital
subject: Keeping our foot on the gas
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
A few weeks ago, we reached out to let you know how we’re connecting with supporters on social media. We have a strategy that makes sure we’re running our digital race in a finely tuned race car, while other candidates putter along in Model Ts. A keystone of our strategy is running the vitally important digital ads that enable us to get our message out to Maryland voters, and expand our audience to people who want to have quality discussions about the future of our state.
But in order to do this, we need your help! Will you help us share our message of hope and inclusion by chipping in for our digital ads? The more we can raise through this fundraising push, the more people we can reach through ads!
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active]During the pandemic, our social media platforms have been indispensable in allowing Peter Franchot to connect with everyday Marylanders. Though we’ve all been socially distanced over the past year, social media has bridged our physical divides and allowed us to come together amidst this unprecedented crisis.
We want to be able to continue using social media to bring people together. This includes using our platform to elevate the values that unite us!
We know our supporters are committed to building Maryland’s middle class, improving the health of our environment, and ensuring every student can attend a world class public school -- and so are we.
If you want to see our people-powered movement continue to grow, then we need your help today. Chip in to help us spread our message of a stronger future for all of Maryland by running more digital ads. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot Digital
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/digitaladsrace2?refcode=active&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/beed1904-fabe-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/d1a85722-8dc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWE4NTcyMi04ZGM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKolFTjEuXPGuJxAS5xyYIuh2YZHj6OK3a10qdFTXL8=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Scott Taylor
subject: An Urgent Message From Scott
body:
---
| | | | | | Thursday June 03, 2021
---
|
---
| An urgent message from Scott...
---
| | |
---|---
|

Kathy Owens for Delegate of the 82nd district.
Special election this Saturday!

I've known Kathy for years, she took my place serving on the Virginia War Memorial Board of Trustees, and she has always worked hard to help our Republican Party.

Kathy is conservative Business owner, she's a Navy Veteran, and has served Virginia's heroes on the Virginia Veteran Services Board. She has been a longtime supporter of the Republican Party with her time and treasure. As Delegate, Kathy would be a servant leader who works to help her constituents, will be accessible, and will get things done.

If you live in the 82nd district and desire the type of Delegate Kathy would be, please don't miss the special election vote THIS Saturday, June 5th, at Galilee Church, 3928 Pacific Ave, Virginia Beach, VA 23451. 10AM-3PM

Turnout will be small, and your vote will definitely count.

Your humble servant,

|
---
| | |
---
|

---

name: Governor Ralph Northam
subject: 400 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for Virginia
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30210812/288831801/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210603-northam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjRjNzRmYi04ZmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNjtJi94uyoiJiV25iYCSkb8BD5yXB2_jvqo_Vnojjs=&emci=5a4c74fb-8fc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5b4c74fb-8fc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)
---
Hi Peter — Never in Virginia’s 400-year history have we had a woman elected as Lieutenant Governor. It’s time to change that by electing Hala Ayala. When Hala was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017, she got right to work. >From introducing and ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment to fighting to expand Medicaid to 500,000 Virginians to co-sponsoring legislation legalizing marijuana in Virginia — Hala’s work has made a lasting impact on the people of the Commonwealth. Now, it’s time for her to expand on that progress as our next Lt. Governor. **Please, join me in making a donation of any amount today to help her win this primary in five days and make history this November. clean_body: | Hi Peter — Never in Virginia’s 400-year history have we had a woman elected as Lieutenant Governor. It’s time to change that by electing Hala Ayala. When Hala was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017, she got right to work. >From introducing and ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment to fighting to expand Medicaid to 500,000 Virginians to co-sponsoring legislation legalizing marijuana in Virginia — Hala’s work has made a lasting impact on the people of the Commonwealth. Now, it’s time for her to expand on that progress as our next Lt. Governor. Please, join me in making a donation of any amount today to help her win this primary in five days and make history this November. Every dollar you give could mean the difference between winning and losing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = It’s going to take a strong, decisive leader to bring our state out of this crisis and continue making the progress Virginians depend on. The Commonwealth needs someone who will sit down and talk with anyone — no matter who they are, what zip code they live in, or what side of the aisle they fall on — and fight for them. That’s Hala. I am proud and honored to support Hala Ayala. I hope you will join me in supporting her today by chipping in toward her campaign for Lt. Governor. Election Day is quickly approaching, so your support is more important than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Let’s win this. — Ralph Ralph Governor Ralph Northam As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. I spoke earlier with my team and we have ONE MORE CHANCE TO HIT OUR TARGET, but it will take YOU stepping up and donating $5 right now in order for us to do it. Thank you, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. body:

| | Derek,

We just filed [our first earnings report](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.wmur.com%2Farticle%2Fnh-primary-source-nhgop-state-filing-shows-receipts-of-more-than-dollar157k-since-november-election%2F36611281/1/01000179d21a9241-7ea34a3e-9fe2-4de9-a532-13dec8d69bf2-000000/6SNE5zBn8OFSBpBk1zYPALCZseU=217) of this cycle, and thanks to our over 300 donors, we are in a better position than ever! We have more than _double the cash on hand_ that we had at the same point in 2019, and are in a great position to defend our victories of 2020.

| _Your contributions have gotten results_. In 2020 we took back control of the NH House of Representatives, NH State Senate, and Executive Council, and reelected Governor Chris Sununu by a HUGE margin. Most recently, we won a special election for State Representative in Merrimack, and next week we intend to do the same in Bow/Dunbarton.

Your support goes farther than ever. Not only have your donations fueled our success, but with almost 97% of what we spend going straight towards electing Republicans, you can be sure that your contribution is making a difference.

Our work is just getting started, and we need your help to maintain our momentum!

We’ve got one going right now, but we need to make sure we’re able to keep it running through Election Day. **[In order to ensure that we have the funds to keep the ad up, I’m asking: will you give $10 right now to Mark’s campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30213300/288840174/1198889615?refcode=210603-email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODYwNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWVhOTQ3OS05N2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Ty7lYbIPFc4PABb601lLnqGmKfCgoRs8uYI9q8ARDw=)** TV exposure will help Mark’s name-ID skyrocket, which is exactly what you need to win in an election that is as wide-open as this one! So what do you say? **[Can you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30213301/288840175/1198889615?refcode=210603-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODYwNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWVhOTQ3OS05N2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Ty7lYbIPFc4PABb601lLnqGmKfCgoRs8uYI9q8ARDw=)** Very best,
Daniel Roth

name: Collier for Texas
subject: overdrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hey there, patriots — With the legislative session ending, campaign season in Texas is beginning. This summer, our campaign will kick into overdrive as Mike travels across the state and talks to Texans about the issues that matter most to them. Whether it’s taking action on climate change, investing in our infrastructure, putting more money into education, or expanding voter rights, we have the opportunity to pave a new path for the future of our great state. **All we need is the political will and tough leadership to do it.** In a state as big as Texas, Mike knows he can’t talk to everyone in person, but he wants to hear from as many folks as possible as he considers a rematch against Dan Patrick for Lt. Governor. That’s why we want to hear from you directly. **[If you have a moment, will you share what issues are most important to you right now? We’d greatly appreciate it>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30214111/288842538/1716169925?refcode=em210603-issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDNmMzQ2Zi05YWM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5Ux9x4BE5L3xdmqqIKG1x5z1nj2e9jpeYrx78C-1Lo=&emci=70aa4868-9ac4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dd3f346f-9ac4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30214112/288842541/1716169925?refcode=em210603-issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDNmMzQ2Zi05YWM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5Ux9x4BE5L3xdmqqIKG1x5z1nj2e9jpeYrx78C-1Lo=&emci=70aa4868-9ac4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dd3f346f-9ac4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)
---
Together, we can solve Texas’ greatest problems and bring our Texas values to the office of Lieutenant Governor.
Thanks for taking the time to share what’s important to you.
Collier for Texas

clean_body: | Hey there, patriots — With the legislative session ending, campaign season in Texas is beginning. This summer, our campaign will kick into overdrive as Mike travels across the state and talks to Texans about the issues that matter most to them. Whether it’s taking action on climate change, investing in our infrastructure, putting more money into education, or expanding voter rights, we have the opportunity to pave a new path for the future of our great state. All we need is the political will and tough leadership to do it. In a state as big as Texas, Mike knows he can’t talk to everyone in person, but he wants to hear from as many folks as possible as he considers a rematch against Dan Patrick for Lt. Governor. That’s why we want to hear from you directly. | Together, we can solve Texas’ greatest problems and bring our Texas values to the office of Lieutenant Governor. Thanks for taking the time to share what’s important to you. Collier for Texas The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

Peter,

Woke Democrats have hit a new low...

**An elementary school teacher in Virginia just got FIRED because he refused to lie to his young students and tell them that a biological boy can be a girl if he wants to.**

What is this world the far-Left has created where teachers are forced to LIE to kindergarteners about their bodies or else face the consequences???

The first step in Marxism is to overhaul the educational system, which is why we must start speaking up and winning the culture war in the classrooms!

We want you to weigh in here, Peter.

_**Do you think teachers should be punished for standing up for their beliefs instead of spreading radical liberal propaganda?**_
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marjorie=20Taylor=20Greene=20=2D=20House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: Pandemic of Lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Please help us stop the pandemic of lies by electing strong conservatives | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/pandemic-of-lies?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| _U.S. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA)_
---
|
---
| Peter:

The real story behind Covid-19 is a **pandemic of lies**.

For more than a year, politicians, public health “experts,” and media elites have helped the Chinese Communist Party cover up what really happened two years ago in Wuhan.

With a flood of evidence now pointing to the **Wuhan Institute of Virology** as the true source of the novel coronavirus, the global elites’ dam of lies is finally starting to crack.

**Now, House conservatives need to smash it to smithereens.**

That's why I support a _**full-court-press investigation into the true origins of Covid-19**_ , including:
* The “gain of function” research being conducted on coronaviruses at the Wuhan Institute of Virology;
* The lax safety standards at the Wuhan lab;
* Chinese communists’ refusal to allow international investigators to examine the facility;
* Big Tech’s censoring of the evidence for the lab-leak theory during last year’s election campaign;
* The three Wuhan scientists who got seriously ill in late 2019;
* National Institutes of Health (NIH) funding of the Wuhan lab and its coronavirus research; and, finally...
* **What did ANTHONY FAUCI know about the Wuhan coverup, and when did he know it?**

One thing we don’t have to investigate is why the liberal media pretended the Wuhan lab leak story was a conspiracy theory, despite all the evidence.

We know why they lied: because the **truth would have proven PRESIDENT TRUMP WAS RIGHT ABOUT COVID-19 ALL ALONG**.

Now, elites are trying to memory hole their complicity in the racist, sexist, genocidal Chinese communists’ attempt to gaslight the world about the origins of a disease that killed 3 million people.

[**We can’t let them get away with it.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=1a40a79b2a&e=b2c16e6198)

House conservatives are going to ask every question, follow every lead, and find every whistleblower from here to Wuhan.

But...

Those elites still control the House floor. They control Congress’s subpoena power. They control the agencies we’re going to be questioning and the media who will “report” on our work.

We can start this investigation in 2021, but the only way to finish it will be to take back the U.S. House of Representatives in 2022.

[**And the only way to do that is for the House Freedom Fund to recruit, nominate, and elect true, principled conservatives who will stand up to the Swamp and for the truth.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=a0840cfcd7&e=b2c16e6198)

You and I both know that establishment moderates will look for deals with Democrats, not the truth about Covid-19. Only true, fighting conservatives will do what it takes to break through the global elite conspiracy to cover up the coronavirus.

HFF needs your help, today.

**Can I count on you to help America uncover what really happened in Wuhan, and make sure it never happens again?**

Can you help us find the truth?

[**Please support the House Freedom Fund today.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=5be8cb6098&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Marjorie Taylor Greene
U.S. Congresswoman, Georgia

---

name: Elaine Luria
subject: This Pride Month 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30220774/288867670/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDhjZmQ1Yy1hZmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OMnII3AYkuK-vS0KcPI1E4L6RorTTD_lpZWXw1ZIYaw=)

| | Friends, On November 8, 2016, I took my daughter with me to vote for the first woman president. Then I reported for duty with the Navy to take part in a training seminar on how our military will welcome and integrate service members who are transgender. I thought to myself: _"The world is about to change for the better today."_ As the election results rolled in, that optimism waned -- but was quickly replaced with the resolve to not sit on the sidelines, but to use my voice to advocate for my LGBTQ friends and neighbors. I was proud to be an original co-sponsor of the **Equality Act** , which would expand the Civil Rights Act of 1964 to include sex, sexual orientation, and gender identity among the prohibited categories of discrimination. **So this Pride Month, let’s honor those who have helped lead the fight for true equality by using our voices to call for _action_. It’s far past time to ensure that LGBTQ Americans have equal protection under the law -- [we’re mobilizing 3,000 signers to demand the Senate pass the Equality Act immediately!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30220775/288867672/608294547?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDhjZmQ1Yy1hZmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OMnII3AYkuK-vS0KcPI1E4L6RorTTD_lpZWXw1ZIYaw=&emci=d9feea96-77c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d8cfd5c-afc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963)** | | | [Add Your Name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30220776/288867673/608294547?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDhjZmQ1Yy1hZmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OMnII3AYkuK-vS0KcPI1E4L6RorTTD_lpZWXw1ZIYaw=&emci=d9feea96-77c4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d8cfd5c-afc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963)
---
This is a first step -- not the last -- on the path to equality and justice for our LGBTQ community.
The world can change for the better today. Let’s make it happen.
Onwards,
Elaine Luria

clean_body: | = | | Friends, On November 8, 2016, I took my daughter with me to vote for the first woman president. Then I reported for duty with the Navy to take part in a training seminar on how our military will welcome and integrate service members who are transgender. I thought to myself: "The world is about to change for the better today." As the election results rolled in, that optimism waned -- but was quickly replaced with the resolve to not sit on the sidelines, but to use my voice to advocate for my LGBTQ friends and neighbors. I was proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Equality Act , which would expand the Civil Rights Act of 1964 to include sex, sexual orientation, and gender identity among the prohibited categories of discrimination. So this Pride Month, let’s honor those who have helped lead the fight for true equality by using our voices to call for action. It’s far past time to ensure that LGBTQ Americans have equal protection under the law -- | | | This is a first step -- not the last -- on the path to equality and justice for our LGBTQ community. The world can change for the better today. Let’s make it happen. Onwards, Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . | Peter,
Americans will not be duped into trading mask mandates for vaccine mandates!
To prevent this from becoming a reality, I just introduced a bill to ban vaccine passports in America \- the federal government has no business asking Americans for their vaccination status, and they should not have the ability to use our tax dollars to support third parties who do.
Let's not allow the public health bureaucracy - led by the manipulative Dr. Fauci \- to become the next entity that drains our liberty away in the United States of America.
---

| The only action that should stem from the tragedies of the past year is holding the Chinese Communist Party and other responsible participants accountable.
But the power-hungry leftists want to use the pandemic as an excuse to target our privacy and civil liberties!
Apparently, we are to believe that the same federal government that brazenly targeted President Trump and threw open our Southern Border is to be trusted with our private health information...
If you don't want the Deep State to get its hands on your medical records, then I hope you'll stand with me and support my bill. We can't allow vaccine passports in America!

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Help me send this Navy SEAL to Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpEjzTzQW_3IQDnVRwVzh7j7h2QmK93p_803gPp5pp5vrXayvFb4YQd9J14cfOYAWjUnJXkPg7M6xdBy4VhPRNCNFbyb82EQzsTer_9IbiPuMs60bqd_Lz--UU8mxrmng4xEwIYhtRUPK3ukBylJPf1v0h_cX1hgm3GvWX3ul9Bb2cwXxjcsEtMuEuHoBDGcR51PP_TB1qOs9Rf41Bsu5inkygF1dgSW&c=ARVJqlH0s0F3AbzPUd5CirBsLJDkeEzgGMa9D1x75DEu6ZHelUPEVA==&ch=7Lifot-H0CHRBMB_qeGX6je930DAlm0r-4D31FHeXjciuBbthVIDQA==)
---
|
Peter-
Our conservative values are under attack. That's why we need fighters in Congress who won't sit back and watch our Texas values continue to be eroded by the radical left in Washington, DC.
And there's not many who know how to fight better than my friend Morgan Luttrell. That's why I'm so excited that Morgan announced today his candidacy for Texas' 8th Congressional District. Morgan's life has been one of service and he's running to continue that service fighting for the people of the 8th district in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpEjzTzQW_3IQDnVRwVzh7j7h2QmK93p_803gPp5pp5vrXayvFb4YQd9J14cfOYAWjUnJXkPg7M6xdBy4VhPRNCNFbyb82EQzsTer_9IbiPuMs60bqd_Lz--UU8mxrmng4xEwIYhtRUPK3ukBylJPf1v0h_cX1hgm3GvWX3ul9Bb2cwXxjcsEtMuEuHoBDGcR51PP_TB1qOs9Rf41Bsu5inkygF1dgSW&c=ARVJqlH0s0F3AbzPUd5CirBsLJDkeEzgGMa9D1x75DEu6ZHelUPEVA==&ch=7Lifot-H0CHRBMB_qeGX6je930DAlm0r-4D31FHeXjciuBbthVIDQA==)
---
| |
---
| | | [DONATE TO MORGAN LUTTRELL'S CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpEjzTzQW_3IQDnVRwVzh7j7h2QmK93p_803gPp5pp5vrXayvFb4YQd9J14cfOYAWjUnJXkPg7M6xdBy4VhPRNCNFbyb82EQzsTer_9IbiPuMs60bqd_Lz--UU8mxrmng4xEwIYhtRUPK3ukBylJPf1v0h_cX1hgm3GvWX3ul9Bb2cwXxjcsEtMuEuHoBDGcR51PP_TB1qOs9Rf41Bsu5inkygF1dgSW&c=ARVJqlH0s0F3AbzPUd5CirBsLJDkeEzgGMa9D1x75DEu6ZHelUPEVA==&ch=7Lifot-H0CHRBMB_qeGX6je930DAlm0r-4D31FHeXjciuBbthVIDQA==)
---
| Morgan is a 5th generation Texan - born and raised. We're both SEALs - Morgan served our country honorably as a Navy SEAL and after a 14 year military career, Morgan retired but continued to find ways to help his fellow veterans and serve his country. Former Governor and Energy Secretary Rick Perry asked Morgan to serve as a Special Advisor at the United States Department of Energy - leading the creation of the Artificial Intelligence and Technologies Office to ensure America continued to outpace Russia and China in the development of machine-learning technology. Morgan worked to harness and combine the nation's most powerful computing resources with next-generation AI analytic tools to help solve some of America's most formidable healthcare challenges like cancer, traumatic brain injuries, suicide, and opioid addiction. As a combat veteran, working to help heal fellow veterans, and leading 21st century technological advances in President's Trump Department of Energy, Morgan has poured every ounce of himself into protecting America.
And now he's ready for his next mission: serving Texas in the United States Congress.
---
| | | [RUSH A CONTRIBUTION NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpEjzTzQW_3IQDnVRwVzh7j7h2QmK93p_803gPp5pp5vrXayvFb4YQd9J14cfOYAWjUnJXkPg7M6xdBy4VhPRNCNFbyb82EQzsTer_9IbiPuMs60bqd_Lz--UU8mxrmng4xEwIYhtRUPK3ukBylJPf1v0h_cX1hgm3GvWX3ul9Bb2cwXxjcsEtMuEuHoBDGcR51PP_TB1qOs9Rf41Bsu5inkygF1dgSW&c=ARVJqlH0s0F3AbzPUd5CirBsLJDkeEzgGMa9D1x75DEu6ZHelUPEVA==&ch=7Lifot-H0CHRBMB_qeGX6je930DAlm0r-4D31FHeXjciuBbthVIDQA==)
---
| Morgan knows that, under the Biden and Pelosi regime, our freedoms are under the constant threat of the socialist agenda. The radical left is waging a culture war on Texans very way of life. I know Morgan, and know he will not allow the conservative values we're teaching our children to be threatened by socialists in Washington, DC. In Congress, Morgan will bring bold leadership, and always put America first. And he'll fight to secure our border, stop radical indoctrination in our kids' classrooms with critical race theory, defend against increasing cybersecurity threats, stand with Israel, and protect America from the threat of Russia and China and socialists here at home. Morgan's life experiences have prepared him to go to Congress and lead from Day One. Morgan is raising his hand and saying he's willing to go fight for our Texas values. I know a little something about defending freedom, and I know that Morgan is going to go to Congress to continue to protect our freedoms and stand up for our Texas values.
I could use another SEAL and patriot by my side in Congress. Please join Morgan and I in the fight for our shared values. I'm asking you to support Morgan Luttrell for Congress.
---
| | | [SEND YOUR SUPPORT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TpEjzTzQW_3IQDnVRwVzh7j7h2QmK93p_803gPp5pp5vrXayvFb4YQd9J14cfOYAWjUnJXkPg7M6xdBy4VhPRNCNFbyb82EQzsTer_9IbiPuMs60bqd_Lz--UU8mxrmng4xEwIYhtRUPK3ukBylJPf1v0h_cX1hgm3GvWX3ul9Bb2cwXxjcsEtMuEuHoBDGcR51PP_TB1qOs9Rf41Bsu5inkygF1dgSW&c=ARVJqlH0s0F3AbzPUd5CirBsLJDkeEzgGMa9D1x75DEu6ZHelUPEVA==&ch=7Lifot-H0CHRBMB_qeGX6je930DAlm0r-4D31FHeXjciuBbthVIDQA==)
---
| In Service,
Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
| Morgan Luttrell is a retired member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
|
---
| | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007
---

name: Team Sarah
subject: Not something we can afford
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

When we say a winning campaign requires a heck of a lot of resources, we're talking about things like clipboards, yard signs, bumper stickers, and even a tank of gas. These might seem like small potatoes, but in a race as competitive as this one, they can make a big difference.

That's why it's so important we meet each of our grassroots fundraising goals each month. Coming in just a few dollars short could mean less gas in the car to keep Sarah out on the road talking to voters, fewer clipboards for volunteers to knock on doors with, and fewer digital ads running online.

All this to say, Sarah's message won't be able to reach the persuadable voters we'll need to turn out if we don't have the resources. And with _Inside Elections_ already calling Wisconsin a battleground race, that's not something we can afford. If we plan to win, we'll need to work our tails off to earn every vote. So, we're asking:

**[Can you chip in $10 to help us meet our extended end-of-month fundraising goal? Your contribution will pay for gas, signs, stickers, and more to ensure we reach as many voters as it takes to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin's Senate seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30221502/288869955/1978118503?gpsid=50_130_19208&refcode=em21_210603_EEOM2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx_SL2&utm_campaign=em21_210603_EEOM2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx_SL2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg0MjFjNC1iMmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjo2pLcTey1mlRP3CuehnN2_Q-XNhd1eW3UCuRLSkoE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30221503/288869956/1978118503?gpsid=50_130_19208&refcode=em21_210603_EEOM2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx_SL2&utm_campaign=em21_210603_EEOM2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx_SL2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg0MjFjNC1iMmM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjo2pLcTey1mlRP3CuehnN2_Q-XNhd1eW3UCuRLSkoE=)

clean_body: Peter, When we say a winning campaign requires a heck of a lot of resources, we're talking about things like clipboards, yard signs, bumper stickers, and even a tank of gas. These might seem like small potatoes, but in a race as competitive as this one, they can make a big difference. That's why it's so important we meet each of our grassroots fundraising goals each month. Coming in just a few dollars short could mean less gas in the car to keep Sarah out on the road talking to voters, fewer clipboards for volunteers to knock on doors with, and fewer digital ads running online. All this to say, Sarah's message won't be able to reach the persuadable voters we'll need to turn out if we don't have the resources. And with Inside Elections already calling Wisconsin a battleground race, that's not something we can afford. If we plan to win, we'll need to work our tails off to earn every vote. So, we're asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. An outside group is spending hundreds of thousands to defeat me. Will you help me set the record straight?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30222252/288872349/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDc4MGJmYS1iNGM0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pq5YyOUP3lRUHg8lBOIxWB3ZgQtaXSrQEdy7J1eXXB4=) Derek, did you see the report in _The Virginia Mercury_ that detailed all of the outside spending happening in Virginia's upcoming election? As a Progressive legislator who stands up to status quos and pledges to not take harmful corporate money, it's to be expected.

| Peter,

**Thanks to supporters like you, we met our ambitious end-of-month goal.** That means we’re closer than ever to defending this critical House seat so we can keep the House blue and continue our work to improve health care, create jobs, and help working families get ahead.

But we can’t slow down now, Peter. I already have multiple Republican opponents and GOP groups running ads attacking me. I look forward to keeping our momentum going so that I can keep fighting for PA-07.

Thank you again, Peter. None of this would be possible without you on my team.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: The Biden Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
President Biden's first 100 days in office have been disastrous for our border. What makes matters worse for our district in Pennsylvania is that my Peter, President Biden’s first 100 days in office have been disastrous for our border. **What makes matters worse for our district in Pennsylvania is that my former opponent, Susan Wild, does not even acknowledge the border crisis as an issue on her website–but you and I both know how important of a topic this is to our nation right now. **
Year to date, the U.S. border patrol has had [726,401 total encounters, up 44%](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b21aed761da341cf94d308cc0bf4e1b2&_e=f4apCVkjIjSGXDpdigdXMub-AeaTxXIp2MzANxScFzJ-780u29AQilvCQJnYi-KXrtVnbrwKc0eIZKKrBJ_cfxq4q6V6pJMrD1wL9JvfOi6aDTrFtdOjZlKq-HWHm-G5wkchZw-CfOMKPL7jj7nTWIo3W9qncaQCZBerFhZ9An7vypYwEBKtu4SNaXKv5YVy35GPxZzbVoPVpoL1C6SqfYl9xSgTiMXnS4R7HcEeaxoulaVqdiC1he0I2meDgm7JrFknRrkWtldlCVds2Mh9Lde6ZgjFhZJhstM1sjTBsfhcnKd5lJBvIUETQW55kFCu) from 2020. Thousands upon thousands of illegal immigrants are crossing the border every day, **and Susan Wild is remaining SILENT. ** On top of this, with Biden’s current policy, ICE has no ability to remove these illegal immigrants because they no longer have the power to remove immigration offenders. For those that do get stopped at the border, they receive no court date and are given a free smartphone courtesy of your hard earned tax dollars. **[As it sits, our Southern border is no longer a border. It is fully open for illegal immigrants to come storming through.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b21aed761da341cf94d308cc0bf4e1b2&_e=f4apCVkjIjSGXDpdigdXMkI6FLkvRPd-xmJkWZCCopH8DpFnwbs5MJdZAPbir4k_PNvy-_8AZrlekrio0sbiTcvQCtgUyr42M4TfHqE0Db3LqUTJ7AkZ17ddvcyqbaWmjECIfmuTFLgWB62IW484IJMMHiYoyx1zlIyLWoPsJS3RcubI_xFmGrx0dBiUunipWOoKQB2gvMP_OmL-kzpk-BO7lpWBmS_R2rprDB6WGfya2bI17bgqFirBezt3lasBTVg-HhYgKZwyUGteRhf7OrezBQ1Pt0jzbrpiIOT_jgFkBTlQC9v3a4gOOdv16N404Spee7lEXGYFPAqLBkL80tEzy_NepjnY7RH-wOGK-KoT8EHouFvOcJSwG-nIAw1dmQMaN0UiqON4WJRUBm2J4Q4-N-4aw_z6ienHPuLiEz4xcmxAloTLlnq1aigXEHmC)** name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: They literally hate my guts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
They are going bonkers |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2072a220bc&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear , The Leftist Media is coming after me because they know I am the single biggest danger to their election-stealing operation.

**My name is Mark Finchem and I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative. I am the voice of a powerful grassroots movement that has united Conservatives far and wide in a common cause: To stop the Democrats from stealing America from Conservatives.**

_Every day we are making history in America’s Audit, where we are counting every ballot in Maricopa County to uncover every wrongdoing and misdealing by the Radical Left in the 2020 election._

**And the evidence we are finding is staggering... Between deleted data files, forgotten passwords, and miscounted ballots its no wonder that President Trump lost!**

And we plan on identifying all fraud and fighting against it in court with everything that we have.

**And what’s next?**

** -Michigan**
** -Pennsylvania**
** -Georgia
****-Wisconsin**

And this is just the beginning! Conservatives cannot feel safe in office until the electoral system is safe and secure, and this is why I am proud to be running for Secretary of State of Arizona!

**If I can do all of this as a proud Conservative in a grassroots movement and as a Representative in the Arizona House, then imagine what I can do as Secretary of State where I will oversee our state’s elections!**

The Left sees this coming and is TERRIFIED.

_This is why I am being attacked on all sides, now in a HIT PIECE by Politico!_

[_Donate TODAY to make sure that America’s voice is heard and join our grassroots movement to save our elections and elect me to Secretary of State!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d1240b1282&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7cf4241185&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Do you know why it is so critical that I am elected Secretary of State?_

**_Because it is not only Democrats we are fighting against, but RINOs who are afraid to stand up for election integrity._**

Just recently, Politico reports, Stephen Richer, the RINO who was recently elected to be Maricopa County’s chief elections officer, lashed out at me, saying:

_“Mark Finchem is running for secretary of state. Process that, if the election was completely fraudulent, as he says, why would you run for secretary of state? What, do you think Dominion is going to rig it in your favor this time?”_

_“Why are you running if you do not believe in these elections? I would suggest that his actions speak a lot louder than his words.”_

You’re damn right, RINO Steven. My actions do speak stronger than my words and my words are strong as hell.

**I WILL stand up for election integrity but I don’t just talk the talk, I walk the walk.**

**_Every day I wake up fighting for our elections and every night I go to sleep with RINOs and Democrats pounding on my door begging me not to shake up the establishment._**

What would he prefer that I do? Lay down and not fight for our elections?

**Hell no. I will fight for our elections in 2021 as I have in 2020 and in 2022 as I have in 2021. This isn’t a thrill ride for me.**

**_This is my love for my country and the sanctity of our elections!_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a5294ff25d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_In this screenshot from the Politico article, they are identifying me, Mark Finchem, as the key driver of the audit of the results in Maricopa County._**

The leftist media is attacking me and singling me out for carrying the torch.

**Politico is again attacking me for being a vocal advocate for election integrity. Why are they attacking me in particular?**

**_They identify me as one of four key nationwide players pushing back against election fraud._**

Liberals and RINOs alike have me on their political hit list and LEFTIST FAKE NEWS MEDIA blasts me on a regular basis.

**What more proof is there that I am THE enemy of the left, the one they are afraid of?**

[_Donate TODAY to fight for election integrity today and tomorrow, in 2021 and in 2022, from now and for our grandchildren!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=070eeede3b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| My name is Mark Finchem. Being attacked on all sides is not new to me.

**It happened to President Trump and it happened to every Republican who fought against the swamp.**

**_You know what I say? Bring it on. The more you attack me the less you can perpetuate voter fraud and the less you can silence proud Americans._**

I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.

**Place your trust in the man who has been fighting for Election Integrity from the start.**
---
| [Donate TODAY! Let's stop election fraud together!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e3f1da29ba&e=44b8c466b0)

Thank you for your support!

God Save the Republic,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5009e54b10&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Fighter

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bd6e648f5d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bd6e648f5d).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Press Release - Kent Challenges Jamie Herrera Beutler to Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress_
body:
Latest Press Release from Joe Kent | | | |
---
| | | **DATE: June 3, 2021**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Byron Sanford ** **Cell: 360.210.6943**
[**byron@joekentforcongress.com**](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com)
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent Challenges Jamie Herrera Beutler to Debate**

Battle Ground, WA - Today, Candidate Joe Kent challenged Jaime Herrera Beutler to a debate in Washington’s Third Congressional District.
---
|
Candidate Joe made the following statement:

Jaime Herrera Beutler appeared on Lars Larson’s radio show and made numerous false statements. Beutler quoted a fake news story from Vanity Fair. Beutler alleged that Secretary of Defense Christopher Miller claimed President Trump incited a riot on January 6th.

Secretary Miller not only refuted such falsehoods, he endorsed my candidacy in April. As a loyal SecDef to President Trump, Christopher Miller executed his office with distinction. It was an honor to serve under Miller in Iraq, and it’s reprehensible that Beutler would make false statements regarding a SecDef in an attempt to tarnish President Trump.

Beutler claimed she’s a conservative. Beutler voted with the radical left to halt the construction of the border wall. She voted for amnesty. She voted for the sham impeachment and was the star witness in the ‘trial’.

Beutler voted against our troops, opposing President Trump when he tried to take our soldiers out of Syria. The slow-rolling by the neocons of President Trump’s withdrawal from Syria resulted in my wife and three other American’s deaths in the line of duty on January 16th, 2019.

Given that Beutler is unaware of what a conservative is, I challenge her to a public debate. Washington’s Third Congressional District needs an America First representative. Not Beutler and her American Last policies.

Secretary Miller and Candidate Joe are both available for interviews. If interested, please email Byron Sanford at [byron@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com) or via cell at 360.210.6943.

###
---
|
---
| [Click Here to view PDF of Joe Kent's Statement on 3 June 2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=0d1cfd6229&e=00856e661d)

body:
| | | | ,
---
| I wanted to make sure you saw my message below. This is a call to action against Nancy Pelosi and her liberal allies. I need to know that you’re with us. [**Please rush a $5 donation today and add your name to our grassroots army.**](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=gAbOqugG6RJ%2BllKwZHsanCcKLgr793zCl2P7lflJIY07yaBnuEoouESomk5Oyk%2Bc0crN98CNYVSN8DE3eHJV5iuuTYpTLjO8V9ugQZPgTGOU56ZLAbRzkLs%2BQnbdEJyS&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FMFHIG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DjJFt37PgIFm9bbNQYAgcOlp1wMe3RPm9fWy5_G5AacoF6CZlG7mcjY39lzuguBAF0&I=20210603180509.000000114acc%40mail6-35-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjE4NzY1NzcwMDY7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE2MDc3OTA1Nzs%3D&V=3&S=6AMwRQhY_AW1nkF3CeQ6MFdFbaqOMoSmflw3fBc9l6Q) I know I can count on you. -Randy

| \--------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Randy Feenstra** Subject: They’ve got Iowa circled on their map
---
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=gAbOqugG6RJ%2BllKwZHsanCcKLgr793zCl2P7lflJIY07yaBnuEoouESomk5Oyk%2Bc0crN98CNYVSN8DE3eHJV5iuuTYpTLjO8V9ugQZPgTGOU56ZLAbRzkLs%2BQnbdEJyS&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FMFHIG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DEZkSSS9gfEKSqq9hWYtBYo4e6LxzVSGoODtBz1jhkx4o5DNuGI9_xZppIn-2mAKU0&I=20210603180509.000000114acc%40mail6-35-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjE4NzY1NzcwMDY7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE2MDc3OTA1Nzs%3D&V=3&S=JdhMdocVLyqBOACyT2CCf5fCMzTvqrVVbQVbCpwgeQk)
---
| ,
---
| We know Nancy Pelosi and her liberal allies have this seat circled on their map. From day one, **I have been one of the strongest voices against Nancy Pelosi** and her extreme agenda in Congress. I can guarantee that they will spend hundreds of thousands, if not millions, to try and take this seat and add another liberal vote to their caucus. Despite this, I can assure you I won’t shy away from my convictions and will continue to fight for our conservative values. I’m going to need strong conservatives to stand behind me and oppose Pelosi’s efforts to gain ground in Iowa. **I’m recruiting a grassroots army to oppose the Pelosi agenda and show liberals in Congress that this seat can’t be bought. **
We have **365 days** until the start of the general election. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Press Doesn't Care – I Do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN DENNIS FOR CONGRESS 2022**
body:
This is a direct quote from Nancy to a liberal reporter when asked about the Democrat chances of holding the House in 2022:
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mzYQwVysysxLvX8CvgfMmQ/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, John Dennis for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mzYQwVysysxLvX8CvgfMmQ/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ)**.

---
| [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mzYQwVysysxLvX8CvgfMmQ/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ "Nancy Pelosi") | **Pelosi Admits Democrats Are Pushing HR1 To _Help Democrat Campaigns_**
---
Fellow Conservative:
That's what Nancy Pelosi is telling the liberal media why she wants to pass HR1 and S1--otherwise known as "the Corrupt Politicians Act."
This is a direct quote from Nancy to a liberal reporter when asked about the Democrat chances of holding the House in 2022:
**_" Well, just the elections are about campaigns, and we are ready. .... _But we would be better if we can pass the H.R.1 and S.1._ "_**
---
Nancy Pelosi wants us to believe that the 2020 election occurred flawlessly, but America will be better off in 2022 if she can pass this corrupt bill and secure her future as Speaker of the House for the next decade.
Her election rigging bill will ban voter IDs, provide federal funding of campaigns, permit criminals and illegal aliens to vote, and of course, **install nationwide California-style ballot harvesting tactics to ensure only Democrat ballots are counted.**
As the Republican candidate running against Nancy Pelosi, **I 'm the only person in America who can stop her, and I can't win without your help.**
**[If you donate $25 or more today and help me reach my goal of $57,189.23, I can continue to be a thorn in her side and force her to worry about the district instead of rigging the 2022 Election!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/HcsktBRuvvc1VbGCpd3Uxg/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ "If you donate $25 or more today and help me reach my goal of $57,189.23, I can continue to be a thorn in her side and force her to worry about the district instead of rigging the 2022 Election!")**
Pelosi may be Speaker of the House, but elections are won and lost in the local district. Like we've seen with Gavin Newsom, the people in my state are getting tired of the liberal lies and ongoing hypocrisy by career politicians.
In the interim, Pelosi ignores the voters here and spends most of her time in Washington moving pieces on the chessboard to implement the most radical progressive agenda since FDR.
* Rigging elections,
* Abolishing gun rights,
* Providing benefits to illegal aliens,
* Defunding the police.
* Funding for earmarks and pet progressive projects, and of course
* Adding a 2-seat majority to the US Senate through DC Statehood.

This is not Nancy's first term as Speaker and that's why she knows how to ram the legislation through quickly. Unfortunately, the Republican Party doesn't have the votes in Congress to block her agenda, **_but you have me._**
**I 'm John Dennis, a life-long Republican activist, businessman, father, and resident of San Francisco for over 30 years. Use me as America's firewall against Pelosi's radical socialist agenda and let's save our nation!**
**[With your donation of $50 or more, we can reach our goal and force Pelosi to be distracted in Washington.](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/zr7E5XvlsuNxCs7BVrZCxw/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ "With your donation of $50 or more, we can reach our goal and force Pelosi to be distracted in Washington.")**
As Donald Trump once said, _" what the hell do you have to lose?"_
If we don't keep Pelosi focused on losing this election, she's going to get Chuck Schumer to help her pass it all and push our nation off a cliff towards lifelong socialism. Joe Biden has indicated that he needs to raise taxes to pay for it, and you know what that means--Pelosi will make that happen too!
This is the same woman who lets her Democrat Members sleep with Chinese spies and ignores it, but impeaches a duly elected President on two occasions based on suppositions, lies, and partisan gain.
Pelosi has been in Congress for over three decades and dedicated herself to assaulting our liberty. She's been waiting for a President like Joe Biden for all these years so she can destroy our freedom and reign supreme over a socialist nation.
She's doesn't mind if it will put your children and mine into generations of debt. She's wealthy and can afford to live in her mansion with walls and armed guards.
Tired of hearing about Nancy Pelosi? I know I am.
**[All of this can end with your donation of $100 or more. With your support, we can destroy Nancy Pelosi's lifelong designs on our nation and keep our nation free!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/fpHxms892UxyBaSrATpnfq3w/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ "All of this can end with your donation of $100 or more. With your support, we can destroy Nancy Pelosi's lifelong designs on our nation and keep our nation free!")**
Or, you can sit back, relax, and pay more taxes while watching her turn this great nation into Cuba. The choice is yours.
For our Future,

John Dennis
Republican for Congress
Father, husband, businessman and patriot
| [DEFEAT PELOSI](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mzYQwVysysxLvX8CvgfMmQ/3ZLU763UO2zoNbPaXjKVYTuQ "DEFEAT PELOSI")

name: Sharif Street for PA
subject: June Newsletter: What we’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
From getting out to listen to the concerns of folks in our community to fighting for gun safety and abortion rights — Sharif is always on the front lines. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224133/288878718/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=&emci=a682f0bc-8fc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f05b408-bcc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | **May was an incredible month for the Sharif Street for PA team. From getting out to listen to the concerns of folks in our community, to fighting for gun safety and abortion rights, Sharif is always on the front lines, ready to represent the fortitude, compassion, and grit of the people of Pennsylvania in the US Senate. ** **Here are some of last month’s highlights: ** **1\. Getting Pennsylvania Vaccinated**
Sharif has proudly joined his colleagues from across Pennsylvania in enacting a robust plan that is succeeding in getting our communities vaccinated. In Harrisburg, he advocated to fund the Black Doctors Consortium to help bridge the divide in vaccinations and COVID-19 testing in Black and brown communities. [_**If you still need to schedule your vaccine appointment, you can find one nearest you here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224134/288878719/-1175251227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=&emci=a682f0bc-8fc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f05b408-bcc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) [GET VAXXED! >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224135/288878720/-1175251227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=&emci=a682f0bc-8fc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f05b408-bcc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) **2\. Feeding Our Communities**
Sen. Street observed the 30 days of Ramadan, from April 12 to May 12, by providing food for 200 families each day. This is the second year in a row Sen. Street has joined with volunteers and community members to provide food for those in need during Ramadan. Through this daily work, Sharif was also able to speak with and listen to community members about the economy, COVID-19, and how we can recover from this pandemic better and stronger than we were before. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224136/288878721/-1735875613?refcode=E8945-20210603-JuneNewsletter-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=) **3\. Ending Gun Violence**
Sen. Sharif has had first-hand experience with the tragic shootings happening too often in too many of our communities, and has dedicated his career to ending the scourge of gun violence in Pennsylvania. He’s worked with Attorney General Josh Shapiro to host buyback programs to take deadly firearms off the streets, and as a state senator, has introduced legislation to ban weapons of war, co-sponsored legislation to require the reporting of lost or stolen handguns, and continues to work to get gun safety measures passed in Pennsylvania. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224137/288878722/610046935?q=https://www.facebook.com/SenSharifStreet/videos/177137977641432&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1622740061198000&usg=AOvVaw0w8bTJUhznOFv_ZQM279GV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=&emci=a682f0bc-8fc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0f05b408-bcc4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) **4\. Protecting Reproductive Rights**
Sen. Street stood shoulder-to-shoulder with the PA Women’s Health Caucus to proudly oppose ALL efforts to restrict women’s reproductive rights in Pennsylvania. Sharif is committed to protecting a woman’s right to choose and access to reproductive health care. While the PA GOP is focused on politicizing women’s bodies and winning points with their base, Sharif is focused on strengthening our communities so we can recover from this pandemic. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224138/288878723/-1735875613?refcode=E8945-20210603-JuneNewsletter-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=) **Our campaign to introduce Sharif to every voter in PA is only getting started, and we’ve already done so much!** [_**If you want to help us continue to listen to voters and introduce them to Sharif’s issues and values, help us get a head start on our June finances by chipping in $10 today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30224139/288878724/-1735875613?refcode=E8945-20210603-JuneNewsletter-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA1YjQwOC1iY2M0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HUMx9cdTOTcQYGy0Dunx-be5AVsMABABGZgapc-Z-Q=) Thanks, Sharif Street for PA

clean_body: From getting out to listen to the concerns of folks in our community to fighting for gun safety and abortion rights — Sharif is always on the front lines. | | May was an incredible month for the Sharif Street for PA team. From getting out to listen to the concerns of folks in our community, to fighting for gun safety and abortion rights, Sharif is always on the front lines, ready to represent the fortitude, compassion, and grit of the people of Pennsylvania in the US Senate. Here are some of last month’s highlights: 1\. Getting Pennsylvania Vaccinated Sharif has proudly joined his colleagues from across Pennsylvania in enacting a robust plan that is succeeding in getting our communities vaccinated. In Harrisburg, he advocated to fund the Black Doctors Consortium to help bridge the divide in vaccinations and COVID-19 testing in Black and brown communities. 2\. Feeding Our Communities Sen. Street observed the 30 days of Ramadan, from April 12 to May 12, by providing food for 200 families each day. This is the second year in a row Sen. Street has joined with volunteers and community members to provide food for those in need during Ramadan. Through this daily work, Sharif was also able to speak with and listen to community members about the economy, COVID-19, and how we can recover from this pandemic better and stronger than we were before. = 3\. Ending Gun Violence Sen. Sharif has had first-hand experience with the tragic shootings happening too often in too many of our communities, and has dedicated his career to ending the scourge of gun violence in Pennsylvania. He’s worked with Attorney General Josh Shapiro to host buyback programs to take deadly firearms off the streets, and as a state senator, has introduced legislation to ban weapons of war, co-sponsored legislation to require the reporting of lost or stolen handguns, and continues to work to get gun safety measures passed in Pennsylvania. 4\. Protecting Reproductive Rights Sen. Street stood shoulder-to-shoulder with the PA Women’s Health Caucus to proudly oppose ALL efforts to restrict women’s reproductive rights in Pennsylvania. Sharif is committed to protecting a woman’s right to choose and access to reproductive health care. While the PA GOP is focused on politicizing women’s bodies and winning points with their base, Sharif is focused on strengthening our communities so we can recover from this pandemic. = Our campaign to introduce Sharif to every voter in PA is only getting started, and we’ve already done so much! = Thanks, Sharif Street for PA Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! **, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. This means all signs point to him running for re-election. After Donald Trump endorsed Johnson to “run, Ron, run” for a third term, Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell are raising millions of dollars behind the scenes to keep this seat in their clutches. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = There’s too much at stake in this election to sit on the sidelines this early on. We need grassroots support throughout every stage of this campaign to win. = Thank you, Team Lasry | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials  thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. These are grave problems, and Jahana has been laser-focused on fixing them. From COVID-19 recovery to conversations related to race and equity, Jahana has been leading from the front. Meanwhile, national Republicans are spending their time and resources firing absurd attacks at Jahana, groping for any headline that will stick.In fact, they just launched a five-figure ad buy to boost their disinformation campaign against Jahana. = It is a tired playbook.
