name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Fauci lied, people died
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fire Fauci now |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=45d1ba9feb&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

You know, one of the reasons I back Gov. DeSantis to the hilt, is how he tells Biden and Fauci to stuff it, when it comes to draconian COVID measures they promote.

Today, we found out that Fauci had been lying the whole time. He had no idea what to do, and his counsel is tainted.

It's time to fire Fauci!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6d9b89b556&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician. I nearly shocked the political world by coming close to beating him last year, and I intend to finish the job this time!**

Have you seen some of these bombshells? He showed political favoritism for Cuomo and against DeSantis:

_An email dated March 19, 2020, revealed more about how the media darling viewed his commentator duties as well as his tattletale style of dealing with state leaders who didn't go along with his "scientific" guidance, providing fodder for Democrats and their media allies to drag DeSantis while turning a blind eye to New York. It's worth noting that Fauci's emails do not contain similar disdain for New York Governor Andrew Cuomo whose mishandling of COVID led to the deaths of nursing home residents.

"Regarding the bars and beaches, I have been screaming on TV 2 to 5 times per night to tell the younger generation to start taking this seriously. I am very surprised that Gov. DeSantis has not completely closed the bars, even if they serve food... I will bring this up at the Task Force meeting tomorrow."_

He lied to people about the effectiveness of masks:

_Townhall also reported on the communications with individuals and media outlets in which Fauci advised against mask wearing for travel, told a medical school dean not to mandate masks, and stated the flimsy masks most Americans were forced to wear were ineffective at stopping the spread of Wuhan coronavirus.

"'Masks are really for infected people to prevent them from spreading infection to people who are not infected rather than protecting uninfected people from acquiring infection,' he said. 'The typical mask you buy in the drug store is not really effective in keeping out virus, which is small enough to pass through the material.' Fauci concluded, saying 'I do not recommend that you wear a mask' to travel by air."_

He also was told the virus was engineered.... but ignored it:

_As Katie reported, Fauci "was told by NIH scientist Kristian Andersen on January 31, 2020, that Wuhan coronavirus looked 'potentially engineered.' In other words, it was manipulated in a lab through gain of function research."

"And yet, that's not what he said publicly as he rejected the possibility of a lab leak in interviews, during testimony to Congress and during official White House Task Force briefings. On April 18, 2020, three months after being told the virus looked engineered, Fauci told reporters at the White House, unequivocally, it didn't come from a lab. Most of the media then reported his remarks as 'debunking' a conspiracy theory."_

This guy lied to us about masks, lied to us about the origin of the virus, and used his position to play political favorites.

_With what we know how, how could we take him seriously? He's the highest paid person in the Federal Government. He must be fired._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9c5efca1d1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**I am proud to have backed Gov. DeSantis against this fraud Fauci. We need to stand for freedom. I didn't spend my whole life in service to this country, just to have my freedom taken away by some incompetent bureaucrat.**__

**Right now, the Republicans are the only ones standing against Marxism. We need to stand firm and demand Fauci's resignation.**

_Help me get to Congress, and I'll be a thorn in the side of the Socialists from day one!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _I gave him the scare of his life- but now they know I'm coming, and I need your help to finish the job!_

We need strong leadership now. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9791c350a6&e=afa21b7626)

The Dems must go! [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our freedoms!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c777770bf5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4399128d5e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=753f60c415&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2b10ad0a16&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=45542488aa) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=45542488aa).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christopher=20Ekstrom?=
subject: 35 Turncoat Judases
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Scram losers |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=cdd4adf5e2&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots changing Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=76ff823661&e=ba6e67b849)!

**One of the biggest travesties of a very bad Congress is the vote for political persecution of America First patriots - the "Truth Commission". **

Whenever the Soviets had a "truth commission", it was always a pretext to settle scores against political enemies and COVER UP THE TRUTH, not investigate it.

Nancy Pelosi held the vote last week on creating a "Commission" to investigate the January 6 events at the Capitol. Every Democrat voted for it, proving that there are no "moderate Democrats".

What was enraging was that 35 RINOs joined her.

The text of the bill shows the intent! It starts out with a judgement, calling January 6 a __**‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’.**__

Well, if they are starting off by calling it that, there is no need to investigate, is there? They already came to a conclusion- _and that conclusion was the most lopsided farce they could think of._

Make no mistake, they want to pin all America First patriots as "domestic terrorists". They just needed to give themselves a fig leaf.

Here's what I say: it wasn't an insurrection. You can't have an insurrection by people who were not armed. You can't have an insurrection when the Constitution guarantees the "right of assembly for the redress of grievances".

_Then again, some RINOs never cared about the Constitution. For them, like Paul Ryan and John Boehner, it was always about "Orange Man Bad", and trying to attack President Trump's supporters._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=cc3a8345b4&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **But for most of these RINOs, it was not their first offense.**

Voted for January 6th Commission and voted to impeach Trump:
Anthony Gonzalez of Ohio
Fred Upton of Michigan
Adam Kinzinger of Illinois
Jaime Herrera Beutler of Washington
John Katko of New York
Dan Newhouse of Washington
Tom Rice of South Carolina
Liz Cheney of Wyoming
Peter Meijer of Michigan

Voted for January 6th Commission and voted for Democrat gun control.
Maria Elvira Salazar of Florida
Carlos Gimenez of Florida
Brian Fitzpatrick of Pennsylvania
Andrew Garbarino of New York
Chris Smith of New Jersey

Voted for January 6th Commission and voted to remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from committees:
Maria Elvira Salazar of Florida
Carlos Gimenez of Florida
Brian Fitzpatrick of Pennsylvania
Chris Smith of New Jersey
Fred Upton of Michigan
Adam Kinzinger of Illinois
John Katko of New York
Chris Jacobs of New York

They think you'll never notice. They think you'll never remember their bad votes. So it's up to us to SHOW them that we noticed!

**_If we don't make an example of them, they will never get it_ \- and they will keep on betraying their voters and their country. We have to make them feel the pain, politically.**
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d1ed571503&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **We need Republicans in Congress to fight for US, and against the radical Democrats. The ones fighting us don't want to fight the Dems, because they AGREE with Pelosi and AOC! [Help us show them the light!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=71b79e9836&e=ba6e67b849)**

Politicians will lie to us and lie to us until we hold them accountable! clean_body: Scram losers | | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots changing Congress, ! One of the biggest travesties of a very bad Congress is the vote for political persecution of America First patriots - the "Truth Commission". Whenever the Soviets had a "truth commission", it was always a pretext to settle scores against political enemies and COVER UP THE TRUTH, not investigate it. Nancy Pelosi held the vote last week on creating a "Commission" to investigate the January 6 events at the Capitol. Every Democrat voted for it, proving that there are no "moderate Democrats". What was enraging was that 35 RINOs joined her. The text of the bill shows the intent! It starts out with a judgement, calling January 6 a ‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’. Well, if they are starting off by calling it that, there is no need to investigate, is there? They already came to a conclusion- and that conclusion was the most lopsided farce they could think of. Make no mistake, they want to pin all America First patriots as "domestic terrorists". They just needed to give themselves a fig leaf. Here's what I say: it wasn't an insurrection. You can't have an insurrection by people who were not armed. You can't have an insurrection when the Constitution guarantees the "right of assembly for the redress of grievances". Then again, some RINOs never cared about the Constitution. For them, like Paul Ryan and John Boehner, it was always about "Orange Man Bad", and trying to attack President Trump's supporters. | | But for most of these RINOs, it was not their first offense. They think you'll never remember their bad votes. So it's up to us to SHOW them that we noticed! If we don't make an example of them, they will never get it \- and they will keep on betraying their voters and their country. We have to make them feel the pain, politically. | | We need Republicans in Congress to fight for US, and against the radical Democrats. The ones fighting us don't want to fight the Dems, because they AGREE with Pelosi and AOC! Politicians will lie to us and lie to us until we hold them accountable! name: Team Schrier
subject: This Pride Month, recommit to the fight for equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Happy Pride, Peter!

Fifty-one years ago this month, the first Pride march was held to commemorate the Stonewall riots in New York City the year prior. Since then, marches have popped up around the country, including right here in the 8th district, and every June we take time to celebrate and uplift LGBTQ+ Americans.

We've made progress since the Stonewall riots in 1969, but we still have a long way to go for true equality in our country. While we may have protections for LGBTQ+ people in Washington State, there are still states where you can be discriminated against simply because of who you love or how you identify.

This year we've seen a record-breaking number of anti-transgender bills working their way through state legislatures across the country including in Arkansas, Alabama, Tennessee, Mississippi, Montana, and West Virginia. We know we can expect more hateful, discriminatory legislation if we don't make equality the law of the land.

**We're not equal until everyone, in every state, is equal.** That's why Kim voted to pass the Equality Act earlier this year to explicitly outlaw any discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. But now, we need the Senate to act and pass this landmark piece of legislation.

**[This Pride Month, recommit to the fight for equality by adding your name to call on the Senate to pass the Equality Act>>](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009bf/3686930856/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/s/tell-the-senate-to-pass-the-equality-act?gpsid=8_30_19201&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+This+Pride+Month+recommit+to+the+fight+f")**

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009be/3686930856/VEsE/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/s/tell-the-senate-to-pass-the-equality-act?gpsid=8_30_19201&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME")
---

Thanks,

Team Schrier

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?**
[DONATE](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009b1/3686930856/VEsF/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-june-2021?gpsid=8_30_19203&refcode=em21_210603_pride_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")
---

Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009b0/3686930856/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.cp.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-email-address?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009b3/3686930856/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.cp.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx"). Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@drkimschrier.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress on [Facebook](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009b2/3686930856/VEsA/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.bsd.net/Facebook?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=6+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009b5/3686930856/VEsB/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://schrier.bsd.net/Twitter?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=7+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9464/72735be7/30857cd8/1e1009b4/3686930856/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schrier&utm_content=8+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx&source=em21_210603_pride_adv_gq___ts_ettx") from Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress emails.

name: Hirsh Singh
subject: They are laughing at us!
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=30fb2b0bc9d248619f3ff6c23f448b36&_e=--MzTZI9iPpLISrHF6yWMTWqGP-fHpSagDH1Thcmcb_Ju4oDLqVvEq69NhVnZd1aVkWWsyu0pS_GKjvJi-j4g-OhuVwlW0CfO-RGiIkJa4jfEtMtMKLllShkHcBGGiH4SAH-yJyDACBwAfCFxBBn1YD-_90RvpKGbMLDt5wj62wxE4yskE9fJku89ibHzPeSWWQEIfqEKcsB0Uv7OQfgWqZls9atgFhuZ3OB1rFfigecT8tGMxxeMYpufoKEQ2sjQPdDyUhYrhVVU8v8OwpKIm19-9qauTCrG92_FsKq6sfujAgVtFnC_F4LPWEyWPOVYe4xr_UBmfOOwPc_T6j_9g%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Conservative, The liberal media is laughing at us. But in only a couple days they won’t be laughing anymore! Last week, I stood face-to-face with the Never Trump pick for New Jersey Governor at our first debate. But what happened at the debate isn’t what the liberal mainstream media is talking about. **On the day of the debate, the Democrat Governor’s Association dropped a poll showing that my Never Trump opponent Jack Ciattarelli and I are neck-and-neck!** I’ll go over the poll itself in a moment. body:
#

Friends — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but we think you should see this.
_The Hill_ just released an article titled the **9 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race.
_“Sen. Mark Kelly’s victory in 2020 gave Democrats control of both of Arizona’s Senate seats for the first time in nearly 70 years. But he’s slated to go up for reelection next year, and Republicans have put him near the top of their target list.”_
We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans.
**It’s going to take a massive team effort to hold this seat, and that’s where you come in, friend:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&amount=3&refcode=em210603-1-15?t=1&refcode2=737_6688874_y1hdcO&akid=737%2E6688874%2Ey1hdcO)

Fellow American - - let’s talk about COVID-19 and Dr. Anthony Fauci.

Back in January 2020, Dr. Fauci told America we had nothing to worry about regarding the coronavirus and criticized President Trump for his travel ban from China. Dems called Trump a racist and reprimanded him for trying to put America first.

Then when 17 million Americans lost their jobs, Dr. Anthony Fauci called the shutdown***** _( *stripping away our liberties)_ ‘inconvenient’.

He flip-flopped about mask-wearing saying they don’t help, and we don’t need them - later changing his tune and suggesting double (or even triple) masking.

To top it off - he’s now claiming we cannot be convinced the virus developed naturally when in May 2020, he dismissed the idea that the coronavirus could have been created in a Chinese lab.

**He’s been wrong, deceptive, and inconsistent.**

| ⚠️ ⚠️ ⚠️

**It’s time for Dr. Fauci to be Fired.**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It's time to choose differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, there's no reason why 140 million people should be poor in the richest country on earth.
**Poverty exists because we allow it to exist.** It's time for us to choose differently, which is why I worked with my colleague Rep. Barbara Lee and the Poor People's Campaign to introduce a major congressional resolution on poverty. We're calling it the "Third Reconstruction: Fully addressing poverty and low wages from the bottom up" — because we have the _power_ to end poverty.
[**Will you join our grassroots coalition to end poverty by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Third Reconstruction today? Building the momentum necessary to turn this vision into reality starts with you.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210603&t=1&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210603&t=2&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)**
Even before the pandemic, more than 2 in 5 people in this country were poor or low-income, just $400 or less away from financial ruin. During the pandemic, it got even worse. By the fall of last year, 8 million additional Americans had been pushed into poverty.
But being poor in this country means more than going without money, a job, or a home, which is why our resolution aims to:
* **Protect our democracy** through expanding our voting rights, comprehensive and just immigration reform, guaranteeing Native and Indigenous rights; addressing the war economy; and guaranteeing adequate incomes and living wages;

* **Prioritize the needs and demands of the 140 million people who are poor or one health care crisis, job loss, storm, or emergency away from economic desperation** , with policies that build up housing, healthcare, welfare, water, and equitable high-quality and diverse public education;

* **Update the poverty measure** to reflect what it takes to secure a decent standard of living today as a new baseline for anti-poverty and social welfare programs;

* **Develop a federal jobs program** that prioritizes poor and low-wealth communities (both urban and rural) to address racial and wealth inequality and build up public infrastructure through socially beneficial and climate-resilient jobs and development; and,

* **Raise resources to invest in these priorities** by redirecting enormous military spending and carceral spending, implementing fair taxation, and using deficit spending.

The American Rescue Plan that we passed brought crucial relief. But just like multiracial coalitions brought about the First Reconstruction after the Civil War and the Second Reconstruction of the civil rights era in the 1960s, our current moment demands action of similarly historic proportions to heal and transform the nation. **We need a Third Reconstruction.**
[**With this resolution as a roadmap to end poverty, we can do what needs to be done and deliver for people across America. Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor today and join us in the fight to lift our society and our economy from the bottom up.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210603&t=3&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/third-reconstruction-resolution/?source=em20210603&t=4&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)**
To poor people across America: we see you, and we will eradicate poverty in our country with you.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210603-342-footer&t=5&refcode2=342_420207_sfyqna&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=342%2E420207%2Esfyqna)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
What issues are top-of-mind for you right now?
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210603-2202-header&t=1&akid=2202%2E2526796%2EmGaXa0)
It’s an understatement to say we’ve gone through _a lot_ in the past year – and we’re all still reeling from the impacts.
Alexandria has spoken recently about the importance of slowing down and “getting into a more proactive space.” **That’s why we wanted to check in today and ask about what issues are your top priorities right now.**
[Will you take a couple of minutes to fill out this survey and share your thoughts? We want to hear about which issues are top-of-mind for you at this moment.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/june-priorities-survey/?source=em20210603-2202-P&t=2&akid=2202%2E2526796%2EmGaXa0)
**[Share your thoughts](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/june-priorities-survey/?source=em20210603-2202-P&t=3&akid=2202%2E2526796%2EmGaXa0)**
Alexandria knows that public service is all about listening to, learning from, and organizing with the people we represent. It was from listening to communities here in NY-14 that she learned about the extreme burden of funeral costs that families were facing on top of other pandemic hardships – and it’s what led her to fight for and _win_ funeral assistance for families.
You’re an important member of this movement, and we want to hear from you too. As we heal from this pandemic and continue the fight for social, racial, economic, and environmental justice, we want to keep the issues that this community cares about front-and-center of this campaign.
[**Will you please take a minute to complete the survey? Your submissions will remain confidential, and will help our team understand what issues to focus on, and what this community wants to hear more about.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/june-priorities-survey/?source=em20210603-2202-P&t=4&akid=2202%2E2526796%2EmGaXa0)
Thanks for sharing your thoughts and input.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210603-footer?refcode=em20210603-2202-P&t=5&refcode2=2202_2526796_mGaXa0&akid=2202%2E2526796%2EmGaXa0)**

Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

| Peter -- This **WAR** these Socialists have been waging against our economy must be stopped. Businesses, schools, and churches need to reopen. Over the last year the Radical Left put their **_“expert”_** Fauci at the helm. Thousands of emails from Fauci were released, and now we see how deep this **_trail of lies and destruction goes._** In these emails we see the **_true side_** of Fauci. A man who says one thing in public and does a **completely different thing behind closed doors.** A man who flip flops whenever it benefits him.
## [**Fauci and the Radical Left made us:**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkOHF9qiFKnHVgsDeWeyEAZKjXzNLDTJ4EBFdm9sxpRywWPf9Dij7mh9oaXCPkAoxc&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fire_fauci&n=2)
* Shutdown our schools and businesses, which increased depression and suicides to levels never seen before.
* Close churches, places where people go to meet their spiritual needs, at a time they needed it the most.
* Close family-owned businesses, some never to be reopened again.

#### **We can not stand for these lies any longer!**
It’s time we stand up to these Socialist bullies and let Americans decide what is best for themselves. I’m calling on all freedom-loving Americans to call on Fauci to be **fired!!** Sign the petition now and **get your voices heard!** No more lies!
### [**SIGN THE PETITION TODAY**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkOHF9qiFKnHVgsDeWeyEAZKjXzNLDTJ4EBFdm9sxpRywWPf9Dij7mh9oaXCPkAoxc&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fire_fauci&n=3)
We need to **FIRE** Fauci, demand an **INVESTIGATION** , and **Make America Great Again**! name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Hypocrisy from the media and more...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e47559585b8a/hypocrisy-from-the-media-and-more?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## WaPo updates headline from 15 months ago ...
Last year, many on the right were skeptical about the origins of the novel coronavirus. They asked questions about where it came from, who knew what when, especially in China. As you can see below, The Washington Post accused Senator Tom Cotton of repeating a “conspiracy theory” that was “debunked.” Well in the past few weeks as we’ve gotten more facts about the timeline and origins of COVID, it seems COVID actually could have come from the lab in Wuhan. Did _The Washington Post_ issue an apology to Senator Cotton or anyone else they wrote off for suggesting that there might be more to the story? No, obviously not. “Fact checker” Glenn Kessler wrote [this timeline with some editorialized snark](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=343ab6d252&e=f6564bbe3b) implying they were right in dismissing the idea of a lab leak as a conspiracy. They also quietly edited the headline from February 2020. As [Greg Price put it](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e9805c4ca7&e=f6564bbe3b) on Twitter “Democracy dies in stealth edits on 15-month-old headlines.”
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | |
---
## VP Kamala Harris gets another job assignment at the White House...
This week at an event commemorating the 100th anniversary of the Tulsa Massacre, [President Joe Biden announced that Vice President Harris](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d529efa35a&e=f6564bbe3b) will be leading the charge on voting rights. I hope I’m not the only one that remembers back during the Democratic primary when Harris attacked Biden’s voting rights record... That’s not the only irony though, in a statement following the announcement Vice President Harris said, “no American should be kept from early voting.” Heads up, President Biden’s home state of Delaware does not allow early voting.
| | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4c771d09db&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## 1 year ago today...
I sat down with my former boss, President Donald Trump at the White House for an exclusive interview on _Spicer & Co_. This was a huge milestone for the show and it’s hard to believe it was an entire year ago. Thanks for continuing to tune in.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5b39404028&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | |
## What I’m reading this week...
Jack Posobiec came on _Spicer & Co_ Tuesday night to talk to us about his experiences undercover within Antifa and inside of Chaz reporting and doing the research for this book. I started reading it and it really is a great inside look at what really is going on behind the scenes in Antifa. |

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | WaPo updates headline from 15 months ago ... Last year, many on the right were skeptical about the origins of the novel coronavirus. They asked questions about where it came from, who knew what when, especially in China. As you can see below, The Washington Post accused Senator Tom Cotton of repeating a “conspiracy theory” that was “debunked.” Well in the past few weeks as we’ve gotten more facts about the timeline and origins of COVID, it seems COVID actually could have come from the lab in Wuhan. Did The Washington Post issue an apology to Senator Cotton or anyone else they wrote off for suggesting that there might be more to the story? No, obviously not. “Fact checker” Glenn Kessler wrote implying they were right in dismissing the idea of a lab leak as a conspiracy. They also quietly edited the headline from February 2020. As on Twitter “Democracy dies in stealth edits on 15-month-old headlines.” | | | | | | | | | | | VP Kamala Harris gets another job assignment at the White House... This week at an event commemorating the 100th anniversary of the Tulsa Massacre, will be leading the charge on voting rights. I hope I’m not the only one that remembers back during the Democratic primary when Harris attacked Biden’s voting rights record... That’s not the only irony though, in a statement following the announcement Vice President Harris said, “no American should be kept from early voting.” Heads up, President Biden’s home state of Delaware does not allow early voting. | | | | | | | | 1 year ago today... I sat down with my former boss, President Donald Trump at the White House for an exclusive interview on Spicer & Co. This was a huge milestone for the show and it’s hard to believe it was an entire year ago. Thanks for continuing to tune in. | | | | | | | | | | What I’m reading this week... Jack Posobiec came on Spicer & Co Tuesday night to talk to us about his experiences undercover within Antifa and inside of Chaz reporting and doing the research for this book. I started reading it and it really is a great inside look at what really is going on behind the scenes in Antifa. | | | | | | Follow along on social media: | | | | | | | | mailto:contact@seanspicer.com ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2021 RigWil LLC. All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. RigWil LLC2308 Mount Vernon Ave Ste 415Alexandria, VA 22301-1328 |
